hero.title: Illuminate the Path Ahead
hero.subtitle: Let tarot and intuitive divination help you tune into the energy around you and find your own clarity.

general.title: General Reading
general.desc: Open to any question or theme — draw a spread and let the cards reflect where your energy flows right now.

fortune.title: Energy Forecasts
fortune.desc: Check in with the rhythm of your days, months, and seasons — so you can move with the current instead of against it.

themed.title: Themed Readings
themed.desc: Go deeper on the moments that matter most — love, purpose, and the flow of abundance in your life.

tagline: The cards reveal the currents — the choices are always yours.
